dialect_notes: Use FETCH FIRST N ROWS ONLY for row limits. NEVER use LIMIT.
NEVER use AS for table aliases. Write 'FROM PROD_DATASETS.HEALTHCARE_PHASE2_PPI h' not 'FROM PROD_DATASETS.HEALTHCARE_PHASE2_PPI AS h'. Oracle does not allow AS before table aliases.

ALL column names MUST be double-quoted because they are stored in lowercase (e.g. "paid", "npv", "behavioral_health_indicator", "line_of_business"). Unquoted identifiers are uppercased by Oracle and will fail (ORA-00904).
Always qualify the table with schema: PROD_DATASETS.HEALTHCARE_PHASE2_PPI.
Use NVL or COALESCE for NULL-safe operations.
Use Oracle standard functions: NVL, SUBSTR, INSTR, ROUND, TRUNC.
NEVER nest aggregates (e.g. MAX(SUM(x))). Use a subquery or CTE for the inner aggregate first.
Do NOT use DuckDB / Postgres specific syntax (LIMIT, ILIKE, ::type casts, strftime, etc.).
Healthcare claims and editing dataset used for Behavioral Health financial, utilization, and quality analysis.
Behavioral Health financial metrics use "behavioral_health_indicator" = 1.
Behavioral Health claim/member metrics use "behavioral_health_indicator_cm" = '1'.
E/M is defined using "betos_category" = 'E/M'.
Unit cost is defined as Paid per Line: SUM("paid") / SUM("non_bypassed_lines").
Edit rate is calculated using "edited_lines" and "non_bypassed_lines".
NPV% = SUM("npv") / SUM("paid").
APV% = SUM("adjustments") / SUM("gpv").
Claims per 1000 members is a context-sensitive metric and must NOT use a naive SUM("claim_count") / SUM("member_count") across the raw visual grain.
For Claims per 1000 members, the numerator must use "claim_count" at the correct visual "level_of_detail" with "behavioral_health_indicator_cm" = '1'.
For Claims per 1000 members, the denominator must use "member_count" at "period_label" grain when "line_of_business" is not present in the visual or filters.
For Claims per 1000 members, the denominator must use "member_count" at 'period_lob' grain when "line_of_business" is present in the visual or filters.
Never mix period and period_lob member_count logic in the same calculation; wrong level_of_detail inflates or deflates utilization.
"period_label" is always the base time grain for claim/member calculations.

Typical "level_of_detail" values for "claim_count" are 'period', 'period_lob', 'period_lob_prod_pos', 'period_lob_prod_betos', 'period_lob_prod_spec', and 'period_lob_prod_cpt'. Match the visual grain.

PROD_DATASETS.HEALTHCARE_PHASE2_PPI.description: Healthcare claims dataset with financial, utilization, and editing metrics across dimensions such as BETOS, CPT, POS, line of business, region, and time. Some metrics require level-of-detail-aware aggregation rather than direct aggregation at the full visual grain.

paid.description: Total paid amount for claim lines.

gpv.description: Gross payment variance used for APV%.

claim_count.description: Claim count snapshot that must be aggregated at the correct level_of_detail matching the visual grain.

member_count.description: Member denominator snapshot. For utilization metrics, aggregate only at period_label or period_lob depending on whether line_of_business is in scope.

non_bypassed_lines.description: Eligible claim lines after bypass exclusions.

behavioral_health_indicator.description: 1 indicates Behavioral Health for financial metrics.

behavioral_health_indicator_cm.description: '1' indicates Behavioral Health for claim/member utilization metrics.

default_indicator_cm.description: Default member-count eligibility flag used when aggregating the member denominator for claims-per-1000 calculations.

level_of_detail.description: Pre-aggregated grain label used to select the correct claim_count or member_count snapshot, such as period, period_lob, period_lob_prod_pos, period_lob_prod_betos, period_lob_prod_spec, or period_lob_prod_cpt.

betos_subcategory.description: CPT code group within the BETOS classification.

line_of_business.description: Line of business. Presence of this dimension changes the correct member_count denominator grain from period to period_lob.

payer_short.description: Payer identifier within a customer. Each customer has multiple payer_shorts. Used in medical-policy edit-rate denominators to scope non-bypassed lines to payers where a policy has GPV > 0.

period_label.description: Base reporting period label for the rolling 3-year view. This is always the base time grain for claim/member calculations.

los.description: Level of service (nullable). Used for analysing duration/severity of services.

telehealth_indicator.description: Telehealth classification for the claim line (e.g. 'Telehealth'). Used with behavioral_health_indicator for financial telehealth metrics.

telehealth_indicator_cm.description: Telehealth classification flag for claim/member utilisation metrics. Follows the same _cm pattern as behavioral_health_indicator_cm.

medical_policy.description: Medical policy name that triggered an edit on the claim line (nullable). Used to identify which policies drive the most edits.

product_type.description: Product type classification (e.g. 'Outpatient', 'Professional'). Used for spend share analysis by product.

derived_metrics.CLAIMS_PER_1000_MEMBERS: (SUM("claim_count") at the correct visual "level_of_detail" where "behavioral_health_indicator_cm" = '1' / SUM("member_count") at "level_of_detail" = 'period_lob' when "line_of_business" is present, otherwise "level_of_detail" = 'period', with "default_indicator_cm" = '1') * 1000
